headline: Has Western Digital (WDC) Run Too Far After Its Multi‑Year Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Western Digital's share price still offers value after a big run, this article will walk through what the numbers actually say about the stock. Western Digital recently closed at US$261.18, with returns of 0.8% over 7 days, a 0.5% decline over 30 days, 39.1% year to date and a very large gain over 1 year and 3 years, plus a 401.9% return over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Western Digital as investors reassess storage and memory related names, tying...
